feed.title: blank
feed.subtitle: Personal website of Artsiom Hramyka — ML researcher and CRUK Pathway Award PI at the University of Cambridge. Transformer-based deep learning for medical imaging, cancer early detection, and Bayesian inference.

entry.title: Welcome
entry.content:
This is the new home for my research updates, paper notes, and occasional technical write-ups. Expect posts on transformer architectures for medical imaging, amortised Bayesian inference, and notes from the CRUK ACED Pathway Award project as it unfolds.

If you want to get in touch about any of this, the best way is email — ah2427 [at] cam.ac.uk.
